creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Created attachment 156019
Update to 3.7.2

Update to PowerDNS Recursor 3.7.2

Changelog: https://doc.powerdns.com/md/changelog/#powerdns-recursor-372

Among other bug fixes and improvements (as listed below), this release incorporates a fix for CVE-2015-1868, as detailed in PowerDNS Security Advisory 2015-01 (https://doc.powerdns.com/md/security/powerdns-advisory-2015-01)

Add cpe and make portlint happy by using PKGNAMEPREFIX
